name: zephyrpay
description: ZK-verified, AI-underwritten HKD-stablecoin credit lines for Asian SMEs on HashKey Chain.

scripts.deploy:testnet: cd contracts && forge script script/Deploy.s.sol --rpc-url hashkey_testnet --broadcast --verify
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @zephyrpay/app && npm run typecheck -w @zephyrpay/relayer
